backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile storage and email subscription features, with role-based access control (admin/user) enforced via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—restoring the Version 9 frontend and updating the CETA Galaxy logo to the Version 16 asset—to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a reference summary for all components, hooks, contexts, and styles in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, borders, radius) used throughout the shadcn-ui component system.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust (CGCT) HOPE Vision 2036' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in LanguageProvider and renders all page sections in order: Navigation, Hero, About, VisionPillars, Reunion, Survey, StakeholderVoices, DigitalImpact, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section featuring an animated six-event timeline (2010–2026), descriptive paragraphs, and a chairman profile card, all with intersection-observer-driven scroll animations.
frontend/src/components/DigitalImpactSec: Section showcasing four digital transformation initiatives (Newsletter, Brand Ambassadors, School Liaison Network, WhatsApp/Email Strategy) as animated icon cards in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Full-width footer with a gold CTA banner, four scroll-to action buttons, Version 16 CETA Galaxy and HOPE logos, contact info, social links, a backend-wired newsletter subscription form, and a copyright bar.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for the CGCT HOPE Vision 2036 site featuring logos, headline, CTA buttons, animated stat cards with count-up, and a countdown timer.
frontend/src/components/LeafMotif.tsx: Decorative background component that renders up to 5 absolutely-positioned SVG diamond/leaf shapes at predefined positions with configurable opacity and color.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll links, language toggle (English/Malayalam), and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/ReunionSection.t: Section displaying the HOPE Alumni Reunion 2026 details including a poster image, event date/time/venue cards, reunion purposes, and participant categories with intersection-observer animations.
frontend/src/components/StakeholderVoice: Grid section showcasing six stakeholder insight cards (curriculum, digital infrastructure, alumni, wellbeing, global competitiveness, teacher empowerment) sourced from February 2026 consultation meetings, with staggered scroll animations.
frontend/src/components/SurveySection.ts: Survey call-to-action section with English and Malayalam external survey links, a confidentiality badge, and a Vision 2036 summary card.
frontend/src/components/VisionPillarsSec: Renders a 4-column grid of vision pillar cards (Academic Excellence, Holistic Development, Digital Transformation, Community Engagement) with bilingual support and scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for English/Malayalam language toggling with a translation lookup function covering all UI strings used across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdown.ts: Calculates and updates a live countdown to a fixed target date (April 12, 2026) every second, returning days, hours, minutes, seconds, and an expiry flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: Animates a number from 0 to a target value over a given duration using an ease-out cubic curve via requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Returns a ref and a boolean visibility flag that becomes true once the referenced element enters the viewport, then disconnects the observer.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exposes a React Query mutation hook for submitting an email subscription via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), configures Tailwind, and adds smooth scrolling and custom scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palettes (maroon, gold, sage, cream), fonts, border radii, shadows, animations, and enabling dark mode with the tailwindcss-animate and @tailwindcss/typography plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, recording two existing features: restoring the frontend to Version 9 state and replacing the CETA Galaxy logo with the Version 16 asset across Navigation, HeroSection, and Footer components.
